title: Cloud Demon Country
content:
Overview
[
]

The Cloud Demon Country was once one of the nine major nations within the Demon Spirit Land, ruled and protected by the ancient Cloud Demon Spirit. he was revered as the guardian of the nation and resided within the royal nine-layered Cloud Demon Tower, a sacred structure symbolizing the country’s divine authority and demonic heritage.

At a critical point in the ancient wars, the Cloud Demon Spirit and other fragmented demon spirits were drawn together to reform into an ancient demon named 
Bei Lou
. During this process, a blood-colored figure charged into the Cloud Demon Tower, triggering a violent collapse that destroyed the structure. Following its destruction, the remnants of the Cloud Demon Spirit coalesced into a black stone statue, later worshiped by the Soul Refining Tribe.

Weakened by the fusion and loss of its true form, the Cloud Demon Spirit retained only fragments of its memories, barely maintaining existence within the statue. Without the protection of its guardian spirit, the Cloud Demon Country eventually fell into ruin, its people scattered and its lands consumed by chaos .

Even after its collapse, branches of the Soul Refining Tribe continued to operate within the former Cloud Demon territory. They venerated the black stone statue that held the lingering essence of the Cloud Demon Spirit, preserving its legacy through rituals and offerings across the nine demon countries.
